Company Name: - License Number & Expires: Track state license expiration
- W9 On File: Yes/No - required for 1099s at year-end
- Insurance Expires: General liability expiration date
- GL Coverage / WC Coverage: Coverage amounts ($)
- Current Rate: What they charge now
- Rate History: Track increases over time (format: $old→$new→$current (years))
- Use this to negotiate and budget future projects
- Update quarterly based on recent projects
- ✅ Current: All docs up to date
- ❌ W9 Missing: Get this before year-end
- File path or cloud storage location
- Insurance expires in < 60 days → Request renewal
- License expires in < 60 days → Verify renewal
- Rate increases > 10%/year → Negotiate or shop around
